overview.description: AI and data engineering consultancy and product company serving large enterprises
overview.description_long: DataSentics (an Eviden business, transitioning to Bull brand in April 2026) solves business challenges for large organizations by building end-to-end AI solutions, industry-specific accelerators and harnessing the latest technologies, including MLOps and generative AI. They are the Data AI Center of Excellence of Eviden. They offer 4 certified Data AI products and 15+ solutions/accelerators across industries including Financial Services, Retail, Manufacturing, and Health & Life Sciences. Key products include Quality Inspector (computer vision for manufacturing), Persona 360 (customer analytics for banks/insurers), SAP to Databricks Integration Accelerator, and Digital Pathology Pipeline.
overview.tagline: We solve business challenges for large organizations by building end-to-end AI solutions

history.origin_story: Founded as a startup by experienced data analytics and BI professionals in Prague; earliest web presence dates to August 2016. Acquired by Eviden (Atos subsidiary) and designated as Eviden's Data AI Center of Excellence.

key_milestones.event: Founded in Prague as a data analytics and ML boutique
Microsoft Gold partner and Partner of the Year 2020
Named 8th fastest-growing tech company in CEE region (Deloitte Fast 50)
Transitioning from Eviden brand to Bull brand (effective 1 April 2026)

financials.parent_company: Eviden (Atos group) — transitioning to Bull brand April 2026

awards: Deloitte Fast 50 — 8th Fastest Growing Tech Company in CEE region
Microsoft Gold Partner & Partner of the Year 2020

metadata.notes: DataSentics is the Data AI Center of Excellence of Eviden (an Atos company). As of February 2026 they announced a transition to the Bull brand, with full rebranding completing April 1, 2026. Homepage states '200+ data science and engineering experts'. An older team page meta description cited '100+' — the 200+ figure from the homepage statistics widget is more current. Founding year estimated as 2016 based on earliest Wayback Machine snapshot (August 2016); company self-describes as 'more than 7 years' of product development (from 2026). Glassdoor blocked by Cloudflare — no rating data available.
